headline: ₹200-500 Cr at risk over project lifecycle due to potential cost of capital increases and valuation compression — Adani secures $3B coal power project in Bihar, raising ESG scrutiny and transition risk exposure
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, CDP, TCFD triggered; non-disclosure risks SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Possible P/E compression (5-10%) as ESG funds rotate out; margin erosion if carbon costs rise.
Potential 20-40bps increase in cost of capital; risk of FII outflow due to negative ESG screening.
